task_completion.description: Navigate to the edit page for the 'Eco-Friendly Sneaker' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin interface shows the 'Edit Product' page with the title 'Eco-Friendly Sneaker'.
In the 'Product data' -> 'Attributes' section, the custom attribute named 'Color' is no longer listed.

task_completion.description: Add the global 'Color' attribute and set its value to 'Green'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product data' -> 'Attributes' section, the global 'Color' attribute is present and the term 'Green' is selected in its value field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the new global 'Color' attribute is set to be visible on the product page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Visible on the product page' checkbox is checked for the newly added global 'Color' attribute.

task_completion.description: Ensure the custom 'Material' attribute is not modified or removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product data' -> 'Attributes' section, the custom attribute named 'Material' is still present.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Product updated' success message is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Update' button has been clicked and the page has reloaded with the changes saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal using WP-CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application at http://localhost/wp-admin/.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct localhost URL for the WordPress admin panel.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots show phpMyAdmin, MySQL command line, or other database administration tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product name: 'Eco-Friendly Sneaker'. The custom attribute to remove is named 'Color'. The global attribute to add is 'Color' (slug: 'pa_color') with the term 'Green'. The custom attribute to keep unmodified is named 'Material'.
